home.title: Ship Next.js apps faster, with AI guardrails baked in.
home.subtitle: A production-grade Next.js 16 template. Supabase auth + RLS, full i18n, dark mode, accessibility, performance budgets, and an AGENTS.md hub that makes AI coding agents pull their weight.

features.sectionSubtitle: Every default in this template exists to save you a class of mistake. Open AGENTS.md or CONCEPTS.md for the full story.

auth.title: Auth & RLS
auth.description: Supabase SSR with a 4-client split. Row-Level Security is the primary authorization boundary.

aiNative.title: AI-Native
aiNative.description: AGENTS.md, CONCEPTS.md, MCP config, Cursor rules, Claude slash commands, prompt-context script — all built in.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Server Components first, lazy loading, Core Web Vitals targets, bundle budgets enforced in CI.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: English, Português, Español ready. Add a locale by editing one file.

a11y.title: WCAG 2.2 AA
a11y.description: Mobile-first, keyboard navigation, focus rings, color-not-only state — defaults that pass an audit.

qaLoop.title: QA in loop
qaLoop.description: npm run qa cycles format, lint, typecheck, test, and build until every gate is green.

stack.sectionSubtitle: Modern, opinionated, and boring on purpose.
